vibe: Objective, rigid, functional, and tactical. A raw utility feel with high-end audio player aesthetics.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Bottom-centric for thumb reachability. Generous spacing (p-6, p-8) to separate distinct functional areas. Use optical alignment.

patterns.bottom_dock: absolute bottom-0 w-full p-6 pb-12 bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/10
patterns.card: p-4 flex flex-row items-center gap-4 bg-[#121212] border border-white/10

url_input.style: h-16 bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-white/20 text-white px-4 font-mono text-base focus:border-[#FF3B30]
url_input.interaction: Highlight border with Signal Red on focus. Keyboard pushes layout up.

convert_button.style: h-16 bg-[#FF3B30] flex items-center justify-center text-white uppercase font-black tracking-wider text-lg
convert_button.interaction: Scale down slightly on press (active state). High contrast.

history_list_item.style: flex flex-row items-center p-4 border-b border-white/5
history_list_item.title: text-base font-bold text-white line-clamp-1

player_modal.style: absolute bottom-0 w-full h-[85vh] bg-[#0A0A0A] rounded-t-3xl border-t border-white/10 p-6 flex flex-col items-center
player_modal.album_art: w-64 h-64 md:w-80 md:h-80 bg-[#1A1A1A] mb-8 shadow-2xl shadow-black
player_modal.save_button: w-full h-16 bg-white text-black uppercase font-black tracking-wider text-lg mt-auto flex items-center justify-center

motion_and_interaction.general: Purposeful, snappy transitions. No sluggish animations.
motion_and_interaction.button_press: Opacity shift or slight scale down.
motion_and_interaction.progress_state: Linear loading bar using primary_accent (#FF3B30) moving rapidly.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure white text on dark grey surfaces exceeds 7:1 ratio. Red button uses white text (exceeds 4.5:1).
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 48x48px for all interactive elements. Core actions (Convert, Save) are 64px (h-16).
accessibility.test_ids: All buttons and inputs MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='url-input', data-testid='convert-button').

media_urls.description: Black vinyl record on orange surface, used as fallback for audio without artwork.
Abstract blue sound wave used as a subtle background element in the player modal (opacity 10%).

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a React Native Expo app. Translate the Tailwind-like utility classes in this JSON into React Native StyleSheet objects or use NativeWind.
Implement the UI with a Dark Theme (Swiss Brutalist style).
Ensure the URL Input and Convert Button are docked at the bottom of the screen to follow modern mobile audio player UI trends.
Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'JetBrains Mono' (or standard system Mono font) for metadata/durations.
For the audio player preview, use a bottom-sheet modal that slides up.
Never use generic placeholder images. Use the URLs provided in media_urls for fallback artwork.
